## Task
Deploy the application to Azure.

> ⚠️ **Prerequisite**: This issue must only be started after Issues 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 7 are all closed (or explicitly deferred). Deployment is the final gate.

### Steps
1. Check for an existing GitHub Actions workflow for Azure deployment
2. If none exists, create one
3. Trigger the deployment
4. Verify the app is live at the deployed URL

## Assigned to
Agent Mode in IDE (VS Code) — prompt: *"All issues are resolved. Deploy this application to Azure. Check if there is an existing workflow file, and if not, create one and trigger the deployment."*
